name: I'm on a ledge
hints: There is a doll here on the ledge. This is the voodoo doll - a key item!
GET DOLL - the voodoo doll is one of the three items needed for the final counter-spell.
GET DOLL. It has pins in it that must be removed before the ritual. SOUTH returns inside to room 9.
notes: Ledge outside the window containing the voodoo doll - one of three essential items for the YELL CHANT ritual. The doll has pins that must be removed as part of the counter-spell. SOUTH returns to room 9.
